name: playwright-multi-agent-system
description: Multi-agent Playwright automation framework with planning, codegen, self-healing and learning loop.

scripts.build: npm run -w @agent/contracts build && npm run -w @agent/executor build && npm run -w @agent/orchestrator build
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w @agent/contracts typecheck && npm run -w @agent/executor typecheck && npm run -w @agent/orchestrator typecheck
